response:
Based on the provided text, the **Reichstadt Agreement** was made between Austria-Hungary and Russia in July 1876, at a time when they were in an alliance with Germany in the **League of the Three Emperors** (also known as the *Dreikaiserbund* or Three Caesars' Alliance).

The text further confirms that Chancellor **Otto von Bismarck** formed this league in 1873 and took full charge of German foreign policy while it was in effect (from 1873 to 1887).

Therefore, both Chancellor Otto von Bismarck and the Reichstadt Agreement were part of the **League of the Three Emperors**.
